title: Better Bookshelves 3D
description: This resource pack adds a 3D effect to Bookshelves and Chiseled Bookshelves and also some variations!
body:
## [![Bisect Hosting](https://i.imgur.com/jZbdTSL.png)](https://bisecthosting.com)

This resource pack adds a 3D effect to Bookshelves and Chiseled Bookshelves and also some variations!

> ###  **DOES NOT REQUIRE ANY MODS**

You can use it in Vanilla Minecraft too
